scripts.dev: concurrently -n "shared,backend,mobile" -c "cyan,green,magenta" "npm run dev:shared" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:mobile"
scripts.predev: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run prisma:generate --workspace=backend
scripts.qa:backend: cd backend && npx tsc --noEmit && npx prisma validate && npm test -- --passWithNoTests
scripts.qa:mobile: cd mobile && npx tsc --noEmit && npm test -- --passWithNoTests
